title: Política 2.0
body: ![Cava&Twitts, Politics 2.0](http://farm4.static.flickr.com/3392/3197746416_72ba680e1b.jpg?v=0 "Politicians 2.0") This afternoon I attended the 4th edition of Cava&Twitts, the speakers were Ernest Benach (ERC), President of the Parliament of Catalonia and deputies Jose Antonio Donaire (PSC), Carles Puigdemont (CIU) and Rafa López (PP). None of them could or wanted to define what politics 2.0 is, but they all agreed (something rare among such different political colors) that web 2.0 is already a fundamental channel in communication between politicians and citizens. They also made it clear to us that both in their blogs and on the social networks where they participate (basically Twitter and Facebook) they reflect their personal opinions on all kinds of topics and that they do not act merely as a channel to express their parties' ideas.
